article.title: Schemathesis - Property-based API Testing Tool
article.abstract: Schemathesis is an open-source API testing tool that generates tests from OpenAPI and GraphQL schemas using property-based testing.

newConcepts.definition: An open-source API testing tool that generates tests from OpenAPI and GraphQL schemas using property-based testing.
Schemas used to describe RESTful APIs, enabling automatic test generation for validation and bug detection.
Schemas used to describe GraphQL APIs, enabling automatic test generation for validation and bug detection.
The process of automatically generating test cases from API schemas to validate behavior and detect bugs.
The command-line interface for Schemathesis, used to run tests and generate test cases from OpenAPI/GraphQL schemas.
The official Docker image for running Schemathesis without local installation, enabling easy integration into CI/CD pipelines.
Integration of Schemathesis into CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) for automated API testing.
